title: Tibs Mitmita
description: A rich, intense Ethiopian lamb stew featuring the deep, floral flavors of cocoa, perfect for a lazy Sunday.

ingredients.name: Mitmita spice mix
ingredients.notes: available at Ethiopian markets or online

ingredients.name: Chili peppers
ingredients.notes: such as habaneros or Scotch bonnets

instructions: Heat the ghee or oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until they are dark golden brown, about 20 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the lamb and cook, stirring occasionally, until it is browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the mitmita spice mix, cocoa powder, chili peppers, tomato paste, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add 1 cup of water to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve the tibs mitmita garnished with fresh cilantro.
